flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at International Business College-Indianapolis fell 45% between 2021 and 2024 (224 → 123).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at International Business College-Indianapolis rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.0k → $17.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at International Business College-Indianapolis rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.0k → $17.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 8 pp at International Business College-Indianapolis vs the 2003–2007 baseline (69.2% vs 77.4%).
